condition.description: Defines an IAM condition that determines under what circumstances the IAM policy binding applies, including attributes like title, description, and expression.

location.description: Specifies the Google Cloud location (region) where the Cloud Run service is deployed.

member.description: Specifies the identity to which the role will be applied; can be a user, group, service account, or domain.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to the member, such as roles/cloudrun.admin.

service.description: Specifies the Cloud Run service to which the IAM policy member will be applied. Must be the name of an existing service in the specified project and region.
